pilot.translate: пилот, летчик, лоцман, контрольный, пробный, пилотировать, вести

examples.eng: The pilot flew to Cuba
The pilot was wearing a parachute.
Our pilot was taken prisoner.
examples.ru: Наш летчик был взят в плен.

examples.eng: He served as a pilot during the war.
examples.ru: Во время войны он служил лётчиком.

examples.eng: a pilot for a new sitcom
This pilot works the controls.
The pilot got clearance to land.
The pilot managed to land the aircraft safely.
a student pilot's first solo flight
The pilot climbed into the cockpit.
He is learning how to pilot a helicopter.
I finally qualified as a pilot.
a pilot grounded by health problems
examples.ru: пилот, отстранённый от полётов из-за проблем со здоровьем

examples.eng: He wrote about his experiences as a pilot.
examples.ru: Он писал о своём опыте работы в качестве пилота.

examples.eng: The crash was blamed on pilot error.
The pilot managed to land the airplane safely.
The stunt pilot looped his plane.
The pilot had to bank the aircraft.
The group conducted a pilot program.
The pilot gave the order to bomb up.
The pilot made contact with the base.
The pilot has logged 1200 flying hours.
examples.ru: На счету этого пилота 1200 летных часов.

examples.eng: The pilot managed to pinpoint the factory.
examples.ru: Лётчику удалось нанести точный удар по заводу.

examples.eng: The pilot radioed in to the control tower.
The pilot brought the plane back on course.
examples.ru: Пилот заставил самолёт вернуться на курс.

examples.eng: a daredevil test pilot having the right stuff
examples.ru: безрассудный лётчик-испытатель, обладающий всем, чтобы добиться успеха

examples.eng: Nearsightedness is a bar to becoming a pilot.
The pilot retracted the plane's landing gear.
The pilot ran through the check-out procedure.
The pilot scheme proved to be a great success.
